note: RFE with respond-by deadline and three explicit actions

message.subject: Request for Evidence issued
message.body_text: USCIS has issued a Request for Evidence for your Form I-765. You must respond by September 3, 2026. Failure to respond may result in denial. Review the RFE notice and submit the requested documents.

note: in-category negative: approval notice, mailed date is in the past, no action

message.subject: Your card was mailed
message.body_text: Your OPT application has been approved and your EAD card was mailed on June 16, 2026. You can track delivery in your USCIS account. No further action is required.

note: visa interview appointment: confirmed date is a true deadline, bring is outside the action lexicon

message.subject: Visa interview appointment confirmed
message.body_text: Your visa interview appointment is confirmed for 07/21/2026 at 9:30 AM at the U.S. Consulate. Bring your DS-160 confirmation, passport, and supporting documents. Arrive 30 minutes early.

note: tuition: two deadlines, large amount, enroll outside the lexicon

message.subject: Fall 2026 tuition due
message.body_text: Fall 2026 tuition and fees are due by August 15, 2026. Your current balance is $14,250.00. Pay online through the student portal or enroll in a payment plan by August 1, 2026 to avoid a late registration hold.

note: I-20 extension: program end date plus relative lead-time deadline

message.subject: I-20 program end date reminder
message.body_text: Your I-20 program end date is 12/20/2026. If you need a program extension, submit the extension request with updated financial documents at least 30 days before the end date.

deadlines: at least 30 days before the end date

note: SEVIS fee: amount with pay and schedule; print outside lexicon; no specific date

message.subject: SEVIS I-901 fee instructions
message.body_text: Before your visa interview, you must pay the $350 SEVIS I-901 fee and print the payment confirmation. Schedule your interview only after the fee is processed.

note: registration window: open and close dates plus late fee; register outside lexicon

message.subject: Fall 2026 registration dates
message.body_text: Registration for Fall 2026 opens June 23, 2026 and closes July 25, 2026. Register early; waitlists fill quickly. A $50 late registration fee applies after the close date.

note: housing deposit: slash deadline plus assignment release date

message.subject: Secure your housing assignment
message.body_text: To secure your housing assignment for the fall term, submit the $300 housing deposit by 6/30/2026. Assignments are released on July 18, 2026.

note: scholarship materials with provide and email actions

message.subject: Dean's Merit Scholarship: materials needed
message.body_text: You have been shortlisted for the Dean's Merit Scholarship. Provide two recommendation letters and a personal statement by July 10, 2026. Email your documents to the scholarship committee.

note: OPT reporting obligation: relative 10-day deadline, report outside lexicon

message.subject: OPT reporting requirements
message.body_text: Reminder: while on OPT you must report any change of employer or address within 10 days of the change through the SEVP portal. Failure to report may affect your status.

note: insurance waiver: charge posts unless waiver submitted by deadline

message.subject: Health insurance waiver deadline
message.body_text: The university health insurance charge of $1,890 per semester will post to your account unless you submit an insurance waiver by August 5, 2026. Waivers require proof of comparable coverage.

note: graduation application deadline with late fee; apply outside lexicon

message.subject: Apply to graduate
message.body_text: Apply to graduate by October 1, 2026 to be included in the fall commencement program. Late applications incur a $25 processing fee.

note: library due date is a real obligation; $0.00 fine balance is not an amount (high-confidence FP trap)

message.subject: Item due soon
message.body_text: The item 'Distributed Systems' is due back June 21, 2026. Renew online if no one has placed a hold. Current fine balance: $0.00.

note: in-category negative: grades posted in the past, contact outside lexicon

message.subject: Spring grades posted
message.body_text: Spring 2026 final grades were posted to the student portal on June 5, 2026. If you believe a grade is incorrect, contact the course instructor.

note: parking permit: expiration and renewal-open dates plus annual rate

message.subject: Parking permit renewal
message.body_text: Your student parking permit expires on 08/31/2026. Renew your permit for the 2026-2027 academic year starting July 1, 2026. The annual rate is $420.

note: optional info session: optional event date is not an obligation

message.subject: Pre-OPT information session
message.body_text: Join the Office of International Services for a pre-OPT information session on July 2, 2026 at 3 PM. Attendance is optional but recommended. Sessions repeat monthly.
